channel.title: extended mind on Christopher Burr - Personal Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in extended mind on Christopher Burr - Personal Portfolio

item.title: Curated Bibliography
item.description: The process of personal knowledge management (PKM) is a particular interest of mine, and has been ever since I started seriously pursuing a career in academic research. Like many so-called “knowledge workers”, a significant part of my working week is dedicated to the curation of my “extended mind”1, which includes notes, tentative ideas for projects, an incessantly growing list of items to-read, preliminary plans for articles (or blog posts), and more.
